pageContext.name: Stormtrooper Lenticular Mini Backpack
pageContext.description: Introducing Stormtrooper Lenticular Mini Backpack from Loungefly. This faux leather mini backpack features an enamel zipper charm, applique, debossed, embossed, and printed details, as well as adjustable straps.  Be sure to add this Stormtrooper Lenticular Mini Backpack to your wardrobe today!
